description.en: UnionPay (China UnionPay / UnionPay International) is a major global card network and payment brand enabling UnionPay card acceptance online and in person worldwide.

api_fields.value: CUP, China UnionPay, UnionPay Card, Ginren

tip: If you see elevated UnionPay declines, verify your PSP is sending the correct card brand, 3DS data (when used), and clear billing/descriptor fields.

faq.question: Is UnionPay a PSP or a card network?
faq.answer: UnionPay is a card network/brand. You typically accept it through a PSP, payment gateway, or acquiring bank that supports UnionPay.

faq.question: Can I accept UnionPay online and in-store?
faq.answer: Yes—UnionPay can be supported for ecommerce and point-of-sale, depending on your PSP/acquirer and terminal/gateway configuration.

faq.question: Why are some UnionPay transactions declined?
faq.answer: Common causes include issuer declines, missing or inconsistent transaction data, unsupported merchant setup for the card brand, or authentication requirements. Check issuer response codes and your integration data quality.

faq.question: Does UnionPay support 3D Secure?
faq.answer: It can be supported via your PSP/acquirer using 3D Secure (where available). Confirm your provider’s setup and supported 3DS version.

faq.question: How do disputes work for UnionPay?
faq.answer: Disputes are handled as chargebacks through your acquirer/PSP. Make sure your fulfillment, proof of delivery, and refund policies are well documented for representment.

faq.question: Where is UnionPay available?
faq.answer: UnionPay is a global card network with broad international acceptance. Availability for merchants depends on your PSP/acquirer’s supported regions and onboarding.

seo.seo_description: UnionPay is a global card network. Learn how to accept UnionPay cards online and in store, support 3DS, refunds, and handle chargebacks.
seo.keywords: UnionPay,China UnionPay,UnionPay International,card network,3D Secure,chargebacks,refunds,card payments
